arts.sum: Peterborough are still struggling to put together a string of results with Saturday's defeat at Wycombe leaving them 15th in League One, a massive 10 points off the top. Eight of the last nine points...

arts.ttl: Preview: Peterborough United vs. Blackpool - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League One clash between Peterborough United and Blackpool, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
